short_summary: Tren de Aragua strike confirmed; Iran deal risk
rationale: The confirmed US air strike killing the Tren de Aragua gang leader is a concrete domestic security action; Trump's public friction over Beirut strikes adds new uncertainty to the Iran deal that US residents have been following. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike, Trump says
top_events.summary: A confirmed US military strike eliminated the Tren de Aragua gang leader — a direct domestic security action affecting immigration and crime policy narratives for US residents.

top_events.title: Trump says Israeli attacks on Beirut unjustified, puts Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Trump's public break with Israel over Beirut strikes introduces new uncertainty into US-Iran negotiations, which could affect oil prices and US Middle East military posture.

top_events.title: Twelve killed in plane crash in US state of Missouri
top_events.summary: A fatal plane crash in Missouri is a domestic tragedy with potential aviation safety policy implications, though limited broader daily-life impact for most US residents.
